docs/agent-manager-technical-report.md.note: 已补充“用户感知收益不足：当前复杂度高于可见优势”章节，用于明确当前系统的基础设施投入与产品收益落差。
技术汇报文档基于当前实现核对完成：当前系统应表述为主控型多 Agent Session Manager，而非自发式多 Agent 协同编排系统；后续若实现跨 Agent handoff/orchestrator，需要同步更新该文档。

src/core/nova/agent-manager/AgentTeamCoo.note: ⚠️ launchWave() now snapshots prompt context once per wave before launching members. If future true parallel launch is added, preserve this wave-level snapshot behavior or later launches may miss unread handoffs consumed by earlier members in the same wave.

⚠️ Current Agent Team is only a lightweight orchestration skeleton: executeWave() marks members done and emits handoff/session_completed immediately after launchSession returns sessionId, without waiting for actual worker completion. Blackboard/handoff currently act as state/UI artifacts, not a real shared-memory collaboration loop.

webview-ui/src/nova/agent-manager/compon.note: ⚠️ TeamControlPlane now relies on both status and consumedAt for handoff/blackboard consume display: handoff is considered consumed when status === 'consumed' OR consumedAt exists; blackboard entries always render a consumed/pending pill, so future UI changes must preserve this distinction.
